title: hymenophyllum balfourii
intro: Hymenophyllum balfourii, also known as the Balfour's filmy fern, is a type of epiphytic fern native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum balfourii include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Hymenophyllum balfourii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional remedies as a paste or powder.
